zh.lifeSummary: Ivetta Bramshall於1135年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布拉姆沙拉爾。她和William FitzBagot of Bagot of Bromley至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1182年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾巴格也斯 布羅姆利享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bramshall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bramhall in Greater Manchester (formerly in Cheshire), named with Old English brōm ‘broom’ + halh ‘nook, recess’. See also Bramwell .

variants.name: Bramble
meanings: English:

from Middle English brembel, bremble (Old English brēmel, braemel) ‘bramble, blackberry bush’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived by a blackberry thicket or possibly a nickname for a prickly person.
variant of   Bramhall  .

variants.name: Brammer
meanings: German; Danish and Swedish (of German origin): habitational name from either of two places called Brammer, near Rendsburg and Verden.
English: variant of   Bramhall  .
Possibly a variant of   Bremmer  .

variants.name: Bramel
meanings: German: habitational name from Bramel near Stade, Lower Saxony.
German: nickname for a person with a sharp tongue, from Middle Low German breme, brame ‘thorn bush’, later ‘horsefly’.
English: altered form of   Bramhall   reflecting the local pronunciation. Compare   Brammell  .

variants.name: Brammell
meanings: English: variant of   Bramhall   or   Bramwell  .

variants.name: Bramwell
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire):
habitational name from Bramhall in Cheshire, with hypercorrect substitution of -well in the final syllable.
possibly also a habitational name from Bramwell in Somerset, but the evidence of the geographical distribution in England makes this origin unlikely.

variants.name: Brummel
meanings: Dutch (Gelderland) and North German: topographic name from Dutch brummel ‘bramble, blackberry’, probably denoting a farm near brambles.

English: rare variant of Brumell, a habitational name from one or other of many minor places called with Old English brōm + halh ‘secluded place overgrown with broom’. Compare Bramhall and Broomhall , which have the same etymology and share many spellings.

History: Henry Brummel (born in Oldebroek, the Netherlands, in 1852; died in New Groningen, MI, in 1918) had a large family. According to Familieboek Brummel (1994), his son William wrote: "We have 10 boys and 2 girls in our family and we are all singers, even the sewing machine."

variants.name: Brimhall
meanings: English: variant of   Bramhall  .

variants.name: Broomhall
meanings: English:

habitational name from Broomhall (Cheshire), Broomhall Grange in Tyrley and Broom Hall Farm in Brewood (both Staffordshire), Broomhall Farms in Kempsey (Worcestorshire), or Broomhall in Sunningdale (Berkshire, formerly in Windlesham in Surrey), all of which take their name from Old English brōm ‘broom, gorse’ + halh ‘nook, hollow’.
variant of the similar Cheshire name Bramhall , which also has early forms in -o-.

nameMeanings.name: Ivetta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English:  see  Ivatt  .

variants.name: Ivatt
meanings: English: relationship name from a pet form of the Old French personal name Iva, feminine form of Ivo. Compare Ive .

en.lifeSummary: Ivetta Bramshall was born in 1135, in Bramshall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with William FitzBagot of Bagot of Bromley. She died about 1182, in Bagot's Bromley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

ja.lifeSummary: Ivetta Bramshallは1135年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブラムシャルで生まれた。彼女はWilliam FitzBagot of Bagot of Bromleyとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1182年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアバゴト'ス ブロムリーで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ivetta Bramshall(은)는 1135년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 브램샤에서 태어났다. 그녀는 William FitzBagot of Bagot of Bromley(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1182년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 바고트'스 브롬리에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Ivetta Bramshall родилась в 1135 г. в местности брамшолл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от William FitzBagot of Bagot of Bromley. Она умерла около 1182 г. в местности багот'с бромли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.
